did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review of raster-scan optoacoustic mesoscopy (RSOM) and optoacoustic imaging (OAI) for dermatological applications. It discusses the physical principles and clinical potential of these imaging modalities for diagnosing skin conditions like psoriasis, eczema, and melanoma. There is no mention of using artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, or computer vision methods to obtain or analyze the results; the focus is on the imaging technology itself.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
